title: LuhTech Venture Roadmap Business v3.0
description: Business-layer data for LuhTech portfolio ventures. v3.0 introduces the full startup financial lifecycle schema: ComputedValue pattern extended to all financial domains (operating model, revenue model, funding model, unit economics, investor reporting). Every quantitative financial claim is a ComputedValue with variables, formula, result, and provenance. No bare scalar financial values. Breaking changes from v2.2: preSeed/seed become fundingModel.preSeed/seed ComputedValues; mrr/arr become ComputedValues; runway becomes ComputedValue; new sections: costStructure, revenueModel, pilotRevenue, dilutionModel, investorReporting.

source.$comment: Inline copy of Source from ComputedValue.schema.v1.0.json. Keep in sync with urn:luhtech:schema:computed-value:v1.0#/definitions/Source.
source.description: Provenance record for a variable. Appears as slide bylines and dataroom justification.

name.description: Full citation name — e.g. 'MarketsandMarkets — Construction Software Market 2024' or 'Internal — derivation from burnRate.result'.

url.description: Source URL. Required for industry-report, government-data, external-research, and comparable.

accessDate.description: Date URL was accessed. Required when url is present.

type.description: Source classification. 'assumed' and 'internal-calc' REQUIRE comment field.

byline.description: Short attribution for slides — under 60 characters.

comment.description: Required for 'assumed' and 'internal-calc'. Explains basis and replacement plan.

variable.$comment: Inline copy of Variable from ComputedValue.schema.v1.0.json.
variable.description: Named, typed, sourced numeric input to a ComputedValue. The only thing that changes when reality changes.

id.description: Stable snake_case id used in formula expressions.

value.description: Numeric value. Non-numeric values belong in metadata, not variables.

asOf.description: Date value was last verified: 'YYYY-MM-DD' or 'YYYY-Qn'.

confidence.description: Confidence in this variable. ComputedValue confidence should not exceed minimum variable confidence.

scenarioVariant.description: Alternative variable overrides and recomputed result for one scenario. Uses parent ComputedValue formula. Only changed variables are listed.

variables.description: Only the variables that differ from base case.

computedValue.$comment: Canonical ComputedValue. See urn:luhtech:schema:computed-value:v1.0 for standalone version.
computedValue.description: A quantitative claim with full provenance. Variables + formula = result. Change a variable, rerun formula, result updates. The stored result is a performance cache; variables + formula are the truth.

formula.description: JSONata-compatible expression using variable ids. Supported: + - * / ^ and parentheses.

formulaComment.description: Plain-English derivation with numeric substitution shown.

result.description: Pre-computed result. Recompute when any variable changes.

displayValue.description: Formatted string for slides. Decoupled from result — may show range, rounding, or human-friendly format.

byline.description: Attribution for slide footnotes: 'Source: X; Y, 2024'.

scenarios.description: Optional optimistic/base/pessimistic variants. Parent variables[] hold base case. Scenarios override only changed variables.

costLineItem.description: A single cost line item in the cost structure. Expressed as a ComputedValue so each cost has source, formula, and confidence.

costType.description: Fixed: same each month regardless of revenue. Variable: scales with revenue or usage. Semi-variable: step function (changes at scale thresholds).

endDate.description: When this cost ends, if known.

headcountHire.description: Planned hire with loaded cost ComputedValue. Loaded cost = base salary + benefits + employer taxes + equipment + recruiting overhead.

critical.description: If true, this hire blocks key milestones.

loadedMonthlyCost.description: Monthly loaded cost for this role including salary, benefits, employer taxes (~1.25x salary), and equipment amortization.

fundingRound.description: A planned or completed funding round. Target amount is a ComputedValue (founder-set with justification). Actual raised is a ComputedValue (verified when closed).

target.description: Target raise amount. Variables must include floor and ceiling with formula = midpoint or founder-chosen target.

raised.description: Amount actually raised. Confidence 'verified' after close with signed documents. Null until closing.

preMoneyValuation.description: Pre-money valuation. Confidence 'internal' for planned rounds, 'verified' after close.

useOfFunds.description: Allocation of proceeds across categories. Percentages must sum to 100.

description.description: What this allocation funds — specific and accountable.

investors.description: Investor names. Omit from T2 if not yet public.

safeNote.description: SAFE note terms for dilution modeling.

discount.description: Discount rate (percent). Optional — not all SAFEs have discounts.

pilotEngagement.description: An active or completed pilot customer engagement. Pilots are the pre-revenue bridge — they validate ICP, generate testimonials, and often convert to paid.

customerSegment.description: ICP segment this pilot represents (e.g., 'mid-size GC, $50M-$200M revenue').

acv.description: Annual contract value for this pilot (may be $0 for free pilots).

pilotValue.description: Estimated customer value delivered by pilot (cost savings, efficiency gains). Basis for ROI claims.

notes.description: Narrative context. Do not include PII or confidential customer details in T2.

pipelineStage.description: A stage in the sales funnel with lead count and conversion rate.

count.description: Number of opportunities at this stage.

conversionRate.description: Rate at which opportunities advance to next stage (0.0–1.0 as decimal fraction).

avgDealSizeUsd.description: Average ACV of opportunities at this stage.

avgDaysInStage.description: Average days spent at this stage.

grossMarginByTier.description: Gross margin decomposition for a single service tier.

tierName.description: Service tier identifier matching serviceTiers keys.

cogs.description: Cost of goods sold for this tier (hosting per user, support cost per customer, etc.).

ventures.description: LuhTech ventures this person is associated with.

serviceTier.description: Product/service tier definition with ComputedValue pricing.

target.description: Target customer segment for this tier.

base.description: Base price as ComputedValue — captures pricing rationale, benchmarks, and confidence.

includes.description: What is included at base price.

currentStage.description: Current venture stage — matches roadmap.json venture.currentStage.

financials.description: Top-level financial container. v3.0: all quantitative fields are ComputedValues. Sections: operatingModel, revenueModel, fundingModel, unitEconomics, investorReporting, market. The market section mirrors v2.2 but with extended ComputedValues.

operatingModel.description: Cost structure and burn rate. Source of truth for all expense data. Transforms derive burn summaries from this section.

costStructure.description: Complete cost breakdown. Fixed costs do not scale with revenue. Variable costs scale with customers/usage.

fixed.description: Fixed monthly costs: infrastructure, founder salaries, SaaS tools, legal retainers, accounting, insurance.

variable.description: Variable costs that scale with revenue or usage: hosting per customer, support cost per ticket, payment processing fees.

totalFixedMonthly.description: Sum of all fixed cost line items. Formula: sum of fixed[*].value.result.

totalVariableMonthly.description: Variable costs at current customer count. Recomputed when customer count changes.

burnRate.description: Total monthly cash outflow. Formula: totalFixedMonthly + totalVariableMonthly. This is the canonical burn rate field — all downstream consumers (runway, investor reporting) reference this value. Migrated from v2.2 financials.burnRate (same structure, new location).

cashPosition.description: Current cash on hand in USD. Confidence 'verified' requires bank statement as source. This is the most time-sensitive field — update monthly.

runway.description: Runway in months. Formula: cash_position_usd / monthly_burn_usd. Variables reference cashPosition and burnRate results. Confidence bounded by cashPosition confidence.

headcountPlan.description: Hiring plan with loaded costs. Provides headcount timeline and cost projections for investor reporting.

hires.description: Planned hires with target quarters and loaded monthly costs.

totalLoadedMonthlyCost.description: Total loaded monthly cost across all current and planned hires at a target date. Formula: sum of hires[*].loadedMonthlyCost.result.

targetQuarter.description: The quarter for which totalLoadedMonthlyCost is computed. Enables 'what is our burn post-hiring' projections.

breakEven.description: Break-even month count from current date. Formula: monthly_burn_usd / (target_mrr_usd - variable_cogs_per_customer * target_customers). Requires both operatingModel and revenueModel data. Confidence 'assumed' until revenue data is real.

revenueModel.description: Revenue tracking and projections. Source of truth for all revenue data. For pre-revenue ventures, values are $0 ComputedValues with confidence 'internal'. Do not use 'assumed' for a zero — zero IS the verified current state.

mrr.description: Monthly Recurring Revenue. For pre-revenue ventures: result: 0, confidence: 'internal', single variable with value: 0. Grows as pilots convert. This is the headline metric — keep it current.

arr.description: Annual Recurring Revenue. Formula: mrr_usd * 12. Variables reference revenueModel.mrr.result.

revenueByTier.description: MRR breakdown by service tier. Keys are tier identifiers matching serviceTiers. Enables gross margin analysis by tier. All values are ComputedValues.

projections.description: Annual revenue projections keyed by year string ('2026', '2027', '2028'). Each projection is a ComputedValue for ARR, derived from customer count and ARPU assumptions.

pilotRevenue.description: Pilot engagement tracking. Pilots are pre-revenue bridge: they validate ICP and generate the testimonials and ROI data needed to close paid contracts. Critical for LuhTech ventures at pilot stage.

totalPilotAcv.description: Total ACV from all pilots (sum of acv per pilot). May be $0 for free pilots.

totalPilotValueDelivered.description: Estimated total customer value delivered across all pilots. Basis for ROI claims in decks.

pilotToPayConversionRate.description: Rate of pilots converting to paid contracts (0.0–1.0). Confidence 'assumed' until pipeline data exists.

pipeline.description: Sales pipeline funnel. Stages from awareness through closed-won. ComputedValues enable scenario modeling (what if conversion rate increases 10%?).

expectedMrrFromPipeline.description: Expected MRR from current pipeline assuming stage conversion rates. Formula: sum(stage.count * stage.conversionRate * avgDealSize / 12) across late-stage opportunities.

salesCycleMonths.description: Average sales cycle length in months from qualified lead to close.

churnRate.description: Monthly gross churn rate (0.0–1.0 decimal fraction). For pre-revenue ventures: 0 with confidence 'internal'. Post-launch: compute from cohort data.

nrr.description: Net Revenue Retention (trailing 12 months). Formula: (starting_mrr + expansion_mrr - churned_mrr) / starting_mrr * 100. Pre-revenue: 100 (by convention, no data yet). Post-launch critical SaaS metric.

fundingModel.description: Funding rounds, dilution modeling, and use of funds. Source of truth for all cap table and funding data.

totalRaised.description: Total funding raised to date across all rounds. Confidence 'verified' after close. Formula: sum of closed round amounts.

rounds.description: All funding rounds, planned and completed. Ordered chronologically.

dilutionModel.description: Ownership and dilution tracking. Models option pool creation and SAFE conversion dilution.

preMoneyValuation.description: Pre-money valuation for the current/next round. Confidence 'internal' for planned rounds.

optionPoolPct.description: Option pool as percentage of fully-diluted shares. Formula: option_pool_usd / post_money_valuation_usd * 100.

founderOwnershipPct.description: Founder ownership after round and option pool creation. Formula: 100 - investor_pct - option_pool_pct - existing_dilution_pct.

safeNotes.description: Outstanding SAFE notes. Each converts at the valuation cap on the next priced round.

investorReturnScenarios.description: Return modeling at exit multiples. Scenario keys: 'exit_3x', 'exit_5x', 'exit_10x', 'exit_20x'. Each is a ComputedValue for investor return in USD.

unitEconomics.description: Unit economics — the per-customer financial model. All values are ComputedValues. For pre-revenue ventures, populate with benchmarked assumptions (confidence: 'assumed') and replace with actuals as data arrives.

arpu.description: Average Revenue Per User/Account per month. Formula: total_mrr_usd / total_customers. Pre-revenue: target ARPU from pricing model.

cogs.description: Cost of Goods Sold per customer per month. Includes: hosting per customer, support cost per customer, payment processing, customer success overhead.

grossMarginPercent.description: Gross margin: (arpu - cogs) / arpu * 100. SaaS target: 70%+ for early stage, 80%+ for scale.

grossMarginByTier.description: Gross margin decomposed by service tier. Identifies which tiers are margin-dilutive.

cac.description: Customer Acquisition Cost. Formula: (sales_spend_usd + marketing_spend_usd) / new_customers_acquired. Pre-revenue: estimated from comparable benchmarks with confidence 'assumed'.

ltv.description: Customer Lifetime Value. Formula: arpu_usd / monthly_churn_rate. Requires churnRate to be set. Pre-revenue: use target churn rate assumptions.

ltvCacRatio.description: LTV:CAC ratio. Formula: ltv_usd / cac_usd. Target: >3x for healthy SaaS. >5x is excellent. Investor benchmark.

paybackPeriodMonths.description: CAC payback period in months. Formula: cac_usd / (arpu_usd * gross_margin_pct / 100). Target: <18 months for early-stage SaaS.

churnRate.description: Monthly gross churn rate as decimal fraction. References revenueModel.churnRate. Kept here for unit economics formula chain.

investorReporting.description: Standard SaaS and investor reporting metrics. These fields feed the investor-update transform. Monthly snapshot enables historical trend tracking. All values are ComputedValues referencing upstream financial fields.

saasMetrics.description: Standard SaaS KPIs expected by institutional investors. All are ComputedValues derived from revenueModel and unitEconomics.

arr.description: Annual Recurring Revenue. References revenueModel.arr. Kept here for investor reporting convenience.

ndr.description: Net Dollar Retention (trailing 12 months). References revenueModel.nrr. NDR > 100% indicates expansion revenue exceeds churn.

burnMultiple.description: Net burn / net new ARR. Formula: monthly_burn_usd / (net_new_arr_usd / 12). Measures capital efficiency. Target: <2x for efficient growth. Pre-revenue: undefined (set to null result).

magicNumber.description: Sales efficiency: net new ARR / prior quarter S&M spend. Target: >0.75 is efficient. Pre-revenue: undefined.

ruleOf40.description: Rule of 40: ARR growth rate % + profit margin %. Target: >40 for healthy SaaS. Formula: arr_growth_rate_pct + ebitda_margin_pct.

monthlySnapshot.description: Current-month investor reporting snapshot. The investor-update transform reads this section. Update at start of each month. Historical snapshots are NOT stored here — use a time-series store or the holding-level report.

reportingDate.description: First day of the reporting month.

cashOnHand.description: Cash on hand as of reporting date.

runway.description: Runway in months as of reporting date.

highlights.description: Top 3-5 positive developments this month. Be specific: 'Completed first paid pilot with XYZ Corp at $2K/mo'.

lowlights.description: Top 1-3 challenges or misses this month. Be honest — investors prefer transparency to surprises.

nextMilestones.description: Top 3 milestones expected in the next 30-60 days.

keyDecisions.description: Decisions made this month that investors should be aware of.

market.description: Market sizing — unchanged from v2.2 pattern but with extended ComputedValue support (scenarios, stalenessPolicy). TAM → SAM → SOM derivation chain is explicit. All figures are ComputedValues.

tam.description: Total Addressable Market. Confidence 'high' requires industry-report or government-data source with URL and date. Include scenarios for market size sensitivity.

sam.description: Serviceable Addressable Market. Formula: tam * geography_pct * segment_pct. Variables reference tam.result via internal-ref.

som.description: Serviceable Obtainable Market. Formula: sam * capture_rate. capture_rate MUST have comment explaining comparables and replacement plan.

cagr.description: CAGR for the relevant market. Formula: ((end/start)^(1/n) - 1) * 100.

trends.description: Key market trends driving TAM expansion or ICP urgency.

icp.description: Ideal Customer Profile definition. Used to bound SAM and inform sales targeting.

competitivePricingBenchmarks.description: Competitor pricing data — used for ARPU and pricing tier design. Each entry is a ComputedValue with source pointing to public pricing page or report.

pricePoint.description: Monthly ACV or per-seat price. Source must be public pricing page or comparable deal.

tier.description: Which tier this price point represents.

team.description: Team composition. Source of truth for all team data.

keyHires.description: Planned key hires. Same as financials.operatingModel.headcountPlan.hires — kept here for team section completeness. Transforms should prefer headcountPlan for financial calculations.

serviceTiers.description: Product/service tier definitions. Pricing is a ComputedValue. Used by revenueModel.revenueByTier and unitEconomics.grossMarginByTier.

traction.description: Traction evidence. Non-financial validation data for investor decks.

presentation.description: Human-curated slide content. Canonical source for investor deck copy.

extensions.description: Venture-specific financial extensions. Use this for domain-specific fields (e.g., Ectropy project-level economics, JobsiteControl hardware margin). Keys should be prefixed with ventureid: e.g., 'extensions.ectropy.projectEconomics'. Never put base schema fields here.

breakingChanges: financials.preSeedUse (object of strings) → financials.fundingModel.rounds[0].useOfFunds (array of ComputedValue allocations)
financials.runway (integer) → financials.operatingModel.runway (ComputedValue with cashPosition / burnRate formula)
financials.pilotValueProjection (bare object with nulls) → financials.revenueModel.pilotRevenue.engagements[] (full pilotEngagement schema)
financials.unitEconomics preserved at financials.unitEconomics (unchanged path, same structure)
nonBreakingAdditions: financials.revenueModel.projections — replaces financials.projections (same structure, same path if ventures already populated it)
x-migrationGuide.migrationStrategy: Run migration script: tools/migrate-v2.2-to-v3.0.py. Manually review all fields migrated to ComputedValue — ensure variables and sources are correct. Do not auto-fill sources; set confidence: 'assumed' with comment explaining why source is missing.

changes: ComputedValue schema consolidated as $defs type — consistent with ComputedValue.schema.v1.0.json
Added ConfidenceLevel: 'verified' and 'internal' levels (was: high/medium/low/assumed in v2.2)
Added SourceType: 'internal-ref', 'internal-estimate', 'external-research' (expanding v2.2 set)
Redesigned financials: split into operatingModel, revenueModel, fundingModel, unitEconomics, investorReporting
preSeed/seed → fundingModel.rounds[] (fundingRound objects with ComputedValue targets)
mrr/arr → revenueModel.mrr/arr (ComputedValues, was strings in v2.2)
runway → operatingModel.runway (ComputedValue, was integer in v2.2)
Added operatingModel.costStructure with fixed/variable cost line items
Added operatingModel.headcountPlan with loaded monthly cost per hire
Added revenueModel.pilotRevenue for pilot engagement tracking
Added revenueModel.pipeline for sales funnel modeling
Added fundingModel.dilutionModel with SAFE notes and investor return scenarios
Added investorReporting.saasMetrics (burnMultiple, magicNumber, ruleOf40, NDR)
Added investorReporting.monthlySnapshot for investor update transforms
Added market.icp and market.competitivePricingBenchmarks
Added serviceTiers.pricing.base as ComputedValue
Added ScenarioVariant/Scenarios support to computedValue (optimistic/base/pessimistic)
All unitEconomics preserved from v2.2 — added ltvCacRatio, paybackPeriodMonths, grossMarginByTier
Introduced ComputedValue pattern for burnRate, market.tam/sam/som/cagr
Added unitEconomics section with arpu, cogs, grossMarginPercent, ltv, cac, churnRate
Added annualProjection type for revenue projections
